13cf3392.name: claudecode
13cf3392.description: Claude Code terminal for Olares. Claude starts on launch and manages its own auth.
13cf3392.title: Claude Code
13cf3392.fullDescription:
Claude Code running directly in a web terminal on your Olares device.

Claude starts on launch and handles its own authentication interactively —
exactly as it would in a local terminal. No file tree, no settings panel,
no pre-configured credentials required.

Optional: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Studio's Environment Variables configuration
to skip the interactive login flow entirely. Without it, Claude will prompt you
to authenticate on first launch; credentials are saved and not required again.

Features:
- Instant Claude Code terminal on open — no extra clicks
- Claude-managed authentication (Anthropic account or API key, your choice)
- Optional ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for zero-prompt startup
- Persistent home directory: auth and session history survive restarts
13cf3392.upgradeDescription: Version bump to 1.1.0. No functional changes from 0.2.0.

metadata.title: Claude Code
metadata.description: 在 Olares 上运行的 Claude Code 终端

6e3681ab.name: llamacppgemma312b
6e3681ab.description: Gemma 3 12B IT Q8_0 dense model via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
6e3681ab.title: Gemma 3 12B IT Q8
6e3681ab.fullDescription:
Google Gemma 3 12B IT served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

Dense 12B parameter multimodal model with strong reasoning and multilingual capabilities.
Q8_0 quantization (12.5GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).
128K native context window with quantized KV cache. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

Expected performance: ~80-130 tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~12.5GB).

metadata.title: Gemma 3 12B IT Q8
metadata.description: Gemma 3 12B IT Q8_0 稠密模型通过 llama.cpp 提供服务 — 针对 Olares One 优化

spec.fullDescription:
Google Gemma 3 12B IT 通过 llama.cpp 提供服务，针对 Olares One 硬件优化。

12B 参数稠密多模态模型，具备强大的推理和多语言能力。
Q8_0 量化（12.5GB）。RTX 5090M（24GB 显存）全 GPU 卸载。
128K 原生上下文窗口，量化 KV 缓存。端口 8080 提供 OpenAI 兼容 API。

预期性能：约 80-130 tokens/秒。首次启动时自动下载模型（约 12.5GB）。

dbc88bc8.name: llamacppqwen35a3buncensored
dbc88bc8.description: Qwen3.5 35B MoE (3B active) uncensored model via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
dbc88bc8.title: Qwen35 35B-A3B Uncensored
dbc88bc8.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive) served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
Q4_K_M quantization (21.2GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).
16K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

Expected performance: ~200 tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~21.2GB).

8c63f603.name: llamacppqwen3coder30ba3b
8c63f603.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct agentic coding model via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
8c63f603.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B
8c63f603.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

Agentic coding model with superior code generation, tool-calling, and repository-scale understanding.
MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3.3B active parameters).
Q4_K_M quantization (18.6GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).
64K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

Expected performance: ~200 tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~18.6GB).

3d1b0d00.name: obsidisync
3d1b0d00.description: WebDAV bridge for Obsidian vault sync
3d1b0d00.title: Obsidisync
3d1b0d00.fullDescription:
Obsidisync exposes your Olares Obsidian vaults over WebDAV so you can sync
them with Obsidian's Remotely Save plugin across desktop, mobile, and
automation tools like Claude.

Features:
- Serves all vaults under Home/Obsidian/ as WebDAV directories
- Bearer token authentication for secure access
- Works with Obsidian Remotely Save plugin
- Compatible with any WebDAV client or curl
- Lightweight Go server (~20MB container image)

metadata.title: Obsidisync
metadata.description: WebDAV bridge for Obsidian vault sync

spec.fullDescription:
Obsidisync exposes your Olares Obsidian vaults over WebDAV so you can sync
them with Obsidian's Remotely Save plugin across desktop, mobile, and
automation tools like Claude.

Features:
- Serves all vaults under Home/Obsidian/ as WebDAV directories
- Bearer token authentication for secure access
- Works with Obsidian Remotely Save plugin
- Compatible with any WebDAV client or curl
- Lightweight Go server (~20MB container image)

metadata.title: Obsidisync
metadata.description: Obsidian 保险库 WebDAV 同步桥接

spec.fullDescription:
Obsidisync 通过 WebDAV 协议暴露您在 Olares 上的 Obsidian 保险库，
让您可以使用 Obsidian 的 Remotely Save 插件在桌面端、移动端以及
Claude 等自动化工具之间同步笔记。

功能特性：
- 将 Home/Obsidian/ 下的所有保险库作为 WebDAV 目录提供
- Bearer token 身份验证确保安全访问
- 兼容 Obsidian Remotely Save 插件
- 兼容任何 WebDAV 客户端或 curl
- 轻量级 Go 服务器（约 20MB 容器镜像）

ae235064.name: vllmqwen3coder30ba3bfp4
ae235064.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 quantized model via vLLM — optimized for Olares One
ae235064.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
ae235064.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via vLLM with NVFP4 quantization (4-bit weights and activations),
optimized for Olares One hardware (RTX 5090M 24GB VRAM).

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
NVFP4 quantization (18.1GB). 2GB CPU offload for MoE workspace headroom.
16K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

Expected performance: ~200+ tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~18.1GB).

metadata.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
metadata.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 quantized model via vLLM — optimized for Olares One

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via vLLM with NVFP4 quantization (4-bit weights and activations),
optimized for Olares One hardware (RTX 5090M 24GB VRAM).

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
NVFP4 quantization (18.1GB). Full GPU inference on RTX 5090M.
16K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

Features:
- Agentic coding capabilities with tool calling support
- Thinking/reasoning mode with structured output
- OpenAI-compatible API endpoint
- Automatic model download on first launch (~18.1GB)

Expected performance: ~200+ tokens/sec.

metadata.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
metadata.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 量化模型，通过 vLLM 提供服务 — 针对 Olares One 优化

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct 通过 vLLM 提供服务，采用 NVFP4 量化（4位权重和激活），
针对 Olares One 硬件优化（RTX 5090M 24GB 显存）。

MoE 架构，128 个专家，每个 token 激活 8 个（约 3B 活跃参数）。
NVFP4 量化（18.1GB）。在 RTX 5090M 上全 GPU 推理。
16K 上下文窗口。端口 8000 上提供 OpenAI 兼容 API。

特性：
- 代理编码能力，支持工具调用
- 思维/推理模式，支持结构化输出
- OpenAI 兼容 API 端点
- 首次启动自动下载模型（约 18.1GB）

预期性能：约 200+ tokens/秒。
